steps.title: Take square roots and find both solutions
steps.content:
Since $(x-42)^2 = 1$, taking the square root of both sides gives $x - 42 = \pm 1$.
This means $x - 42 = 1$ or $x - 42 = -1$, so $x = 43$ or $x = 41$.

steps.title: Sum the solutions
steps.content: The sum is $43 + 41 = 84$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
